title: Mouse Overboard!
author: Elisabetta Dami
desc: Geronimo sails to Portugal to relive Vasco da Gama's voyage — and must catch the saboteur on board before it's too late 🚢

q.en: Why did Grandfather send Geronimo to Portugal?
q.zh: 爷爷为什么把杰罗尼摩派去葡萄牙？

options.en: To retrace Vasco da Gama's voyage and unmask a saboteur
options.zh: 去重走瓦斯科·达·伽马的航线，并揪出破坏者

explain.en: Grandfather said a friend (Secretary Rattio) needed a favor; Geronimo was to play Vasco da Gama in the reenactment and expose a potential saboteur.
explain.zh: 爷爷说有位朋友（拉蒂奥国务秘书）需要帮忙；杰罗尼摩要在重演中扮演达·伽马，并揭穿可能的破坏者。

q.en: Which famous Portuguese explorer is Geronimo first told he is descended from?
q.zh: 杰罗尼摩一开始被告知自己是哪位著名葡萄牙探险家的后代？

explain.en: Thea tells Geronimo their ancestor is the great explorer Vasco da Gama, and he must take on his role in the reenactment.
explain.zh: 蒂娜告诉杰罗尼摩，他们的祖先是伟大的探险家瓦斯科·达·伽马，他必须在重演中扮演这位祖先。

q.en: What is the name of the ship they sail on?
q.zh: 他们乘坐的船叫什么名字？

explain.en: They board the São Gabriel, an exact replica of Vasco da Gama's famous flagship.
explain.zh: 他们登上了“圣加布里埃尔号”，那是瓦斯科·达·伽马旗舰的精确复制品。

q.zh: 贝尔纳多·阿尔莫斯是谁？

options.en: A chauffeur, guide, bodyguard, and sailor who loves fado
options.zh: 一名司机、向导、保镖和水手，热爱法多音乐
一位著名的篮球运动员

explain.en: Bernardo is a chauffeur, tour guide, bodyguard, and talented sailor who loves fado and is secretly in love with fado singer Maria do Sol.
explain.zh: 贝尔纳多既是司机、向导、保镖，又是才华横溢的水手，他热爱法多音乐，还暗恋法多歌手玛丽亚·多·索尔。

q.en: What happens to Geronimo soon after reaching the open sea?
q.zh: 到达公海后不久，杰罗尼摩发生了什么事？

options.en: He gets seasick and is shoved overboard ('Mouse Overboard!')
options.zh: 他晕船被人推下了水（“老鼠落水了！”）

explain.en: Geronimo's seasickness worsened, someone shoved him overboard, and Benjamin raised the 'MOUSE OVERBOARD!' alarm.
explain.zh: 杰罗尼摩晕船加剧，有人把他推下水，本杰明立刻拉响“老鼠落水了！”的警报。

q.en: How does Dr. Matthew Mayo treat Geronimo's head injury?
q.zh: 马修·梅奥医生如何治疗杰罗尼摩头上的伤？

options.en: With a compress made of frozen cod

explain.en: Dr. Matthew Mayo treated the enormous lump on Geronimo's head with a compress made of frozen cod.
explain.zh: 马修·梅奥医生用冻鳕鱼做成的敷布，来治疗杰罗尼摩头上那个大包。

q.en: Who is the helpful 'ghost' aboard known as Paulo Sailmouse?
q.zh: 船上那位乐于助人的“幽灵”——化名保罗·赛尔莫斯的老鼠，真实身份是谁？

options.en: Paulina Pecorina, an aspiring chef descended from da Gama's cook
options.zh: 宝琳娜·佩科丽娜，立志成为厨师的达·伽马御厨之后

explain.en: Paulo Sailmouse was actually Paulina Pecorina, who secretly boarded because her great-great-great-grandfather was Vasco da Gama's personal chef.
explain.zh: 保罗·赛尔莫斯其实是宝琳娜·佩科丽娜，她偷偷上船，是因为她的曾曾曾祖父是达·伽马的专属厨师。

q.en: Who is the real saboteur who shoved Geronimo overboard?
q.zh: 把杰罗尼摩推下水的真正破坏者是谁？

options.en: Sally Ratmousen, disguised as George Gorgonzola
options.zh: 化名乔治·戈尔贡佐拉的莎莉·拉特莫森

explain.en: 'George Gorgonzola' removed his mask to reveal Sally Ratmousen, who had sneaked aboard to embarrass Geronimo.
explain.zh: “乔治·戈尔贡佐拉”摘下面具，露出了莎莉·拉特莫森，她偷偷上船就是为了让杰罗尼摩出丑。

q.en: How is Sally stopped from publishing her embarrassing photos of Geronimo?
q.zh: 莎莉是如何被阻止刊登那些让杰罗尼摩出丑的照片的？

options.zh: 贝尔纳多偷走了她的相机

explain.en: Bernardo took Sally's camera out of her bag while she was talking, so she could not print the embarrassing photos.
explain.zh: 贝尔纳多在莎莉说话时把她的相机从包里拿走了，所以她没法印出那些出丑的照片。

q.en: What is Geronimo actually revealed to be a descendant of at the end?
q.zh: 故事最后揭晓，杰罗尼摩其实是哪位人物的后代？

options.en: Luís de Camões, writer of the epic poem The Lusiads
options.zh: 史诗《卢济塔尼亚人之歌》的作者路易斯·德·卡蒙斯

explain.en: Secretary Rattio reveals Geronimo is really a descendant of Luís de Camões, who wrote The Lusiads about da Gama's journey.
explain.zh: 拉蒂奥国务秘书揭晓，杰罗尼摩其实是路易斯·德·卡蒙斯的后代，他写下了讲述达·伽马航行的史诗《卢济塔尼亚人之歌》。
